channel.title: Use Case Intel — Threat Intel Feed
channel.description: High-fidelity IOCs aggregated from The Hacker News, BleepingComputer, Microsoft Security Blog and CISA KEV. Refreshed daily. CVEs/hashes via regex; domains/IPs only when defanged by the source author.

item.title: [CVE/CRIT] CVE-2026-46333
item.description:
CVE: CVE-2026-46333

Severity: crit · First seen: 2026-05-16 · Sources: Cyber Security News

Context: Critical Linux Kernel Flaw ‘ssh-keysign-pwn’ Exposes SSH Keys and Shadow Passwords

item.title: [CVE/CRIT] CVE-2025-54957
item.description:
CVE: CVE-2025-54957

Severity: crit · First seen: 2026-05-16 · Sources: Cyber Security News

Context: Google Project Zero Discloses Zero-Click Exploit Chain for Pixel 10 Devices

item.title: [CVE/HIGH] CVE-2025-14177
item.description:
CVE: CVE-2025-14177

Severity: high · First seen: 2026-05-16 · Sources: Cyber Security News

Context: Malicious JPEG Images Could Trigger PHP Memory Safety Vulnerabilities
